'''shamobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plaier|plaier]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plaier|plaier]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shamobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæmebeth|shæmebeth]] || [[word:shæmebej|shæmebej]] || [[word:shæmebesh|shæmebesh]] || [[word:shæmebe|shæmebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamomoboth|shamomoboth]] || [[word:shamomoboj|shamomoboj]] || [[word:shamomobosh|shamomobosh]] || [[word:shamomobo|shamomobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamoboth|shamoboth]] || [[word:shamoboj|shamoboj]] || [[word:shamobosh|shamobosh]] || [[word:shamobo|shamobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamofboth|shamofboth]] || [[word:shamofboj|shamofboj]] || [[word:shamofbosh|shamofbosh]] || [[word:shamofbof|shamofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shamobotho|shamobotho]] || [[word:shamobojo|shamobojo]] || [[word:shamobosho|shamobosho]] || [[word:shamoboko|shamoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shamoboth|shamoboth]] || [[word:shamoboj|shamoboj]] || [[word:shamobosh|shamobosh]] || [[word:shamobo|shamobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shamobothol|shamobothol]] || [[word:shamobojol|shamobojol]] || [[word:shamoboshol|shamoboshol]] || [[word:shamobokol|shamobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shamobothotho|shamobothotho]] || [[word:shamobojojo|shamobojojo]] || [[word:shamoboshosho|shamoboshosho]] || [[word:shamoboko|shamoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shamobothon|shamobothon]] || [[word:shamobojon|shamobojon]] || [[word:shamoboshon|shamoboshon]] || [[word:shamobokon|shamobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shamobothoro|shamobothoro]] || [[word:shamobojoro|shamobojoro]] || [[word:shamoboshoro|shamoboshoro]] || [[word:shamobokoro|shamobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
